archipelago.name: Archipelago
archipelago.description: A world of small islands; early exploration and teching crawl until naval units arrive.

continents.name: Continents
continents.description: Two major continents with a chance of a smaller third landmass; a blend of land war and naval logistics.

fractal.name: Fractal
fractal.description: Unpredictable, highly varied landmasses with no rigid continent structure.

pangaea.name: Pangaea
pangaea.description: One massive interconnected landmass; every civilization shares the same continent, emphasising early land warfare.

terra.name: Terra
terra.description: Every player begins on an isolated Old World while a massive, raider-infested New World waits across the ocean.

big_small.name: Big and Small
big_small.description: One large main continent accompanied by scattered smaller islands.

medium_small.name: Medium and Small
medium_small.description: A smaller primary landmass surrounded by islands, favouring naval empires.

hemispheres.name: Hemispheres
hemispheres.description: The map splits into two large, roughly equal landmasses.

tectonics.name: Tectonics
tectonics.description: Simulated plate tectonics produce natural mountain ranges along plate boundaries and dynamic coastlines.

shuffle.name: Shuffle
shuffle.description: Secretly selects one of the core scripts (Archipelago, Continents, Fractal, or Pangaea) without revealing it.

great_plains.name: Great Plains
great_plains.description: A predominantly flat, resource-rich land that encourages rapid expansion and early movement.

highlands.name: Highlands
highlands.description: Densely mountainous; empires form around bottlenecks and chokepoints.

ice_age.name: Ice Age
ice_age.description: High sea level and massive polar caps leave only a narrow, tundra-heavy band for colonisation.

inland_sea.name: Inland Sea
inland_sea.description: A ring of land surrounds a massive central sea, so most empires share tight borders.

lakes.name: Lakes
lakes.description: A landmass fractured by many small, unconnected lakes; limited naval play but abundant fresh water.

oasis.name: Oasis
oasis.description: A fertile, forest-heavy rim around an expansive central desert dotted with resource-rich oases.

tilted_axis.name: Tilted Axis
tilted_axis.description: The world axis is tilted so the poles sit on the sides, rotating the climate bands ninety degrees.
